glosses.el: προς το παρόν; αυτή την περίοδο
glosses.ro: în prezent; în momentul de față

sentences.target: Je cherche actuellement un nouvel appartement.

translations.fr: Je cherche actuellement un nouvel appartement.
translations.en: I'm currently looking for a new apartment.
translations.es: Actualmente estoy buscando un nuevo apartamento.
translations.de: Ich suche derzeit eine neue Wohnung.
translations.it: Attualmente sto cercando un nuovo appartamento.
translations.zh-Hans: 我目前正在寻找新的公寓。
translations.yue: 我而家正喺搵新嘅公寓。
translations.pt: Atualmente estou à procura de um novo apartamento.
translations.tr: Şu anda yeni bir daire arıyorum.
translations.vi: Hiện tại tôi đang tìm một căn hộ mới.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث حالياً عن شقة جديدة.
translations.nl: Ik ben momenteel op zoek naar een nieuw appartement.
translations.hi: मैं फिलहाल एक नया अपार्टमेंट ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Αυτή τη στιγμή ψάχνω νέο διαμέρισμα.
translations.nb: Jeg leter for øyeblikket etter en ny leilighet.
translations.id: Saya saat ini sedang mencari apartemen baru.
translations.sv: Jag letar just nu efter en ny lägenhet.
translations.ro: În prezent caut un apartament nou.
translations.da: Jeg leder i øjeblikket efter en ny lejlighed.
translations.ja: 現在、新しいアパートを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; identifies the speaker as the agent of the verb.
Main verb (present indicative, 1st person singular); expresses the action of searching.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase; situates the action in the present time.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) introducing the direct object noun.
Attributive adjective (masculine singular form used before vowel sounds), modifying 'appartement'; placed before the noun.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'cherche'.

translations.en: She is currently working from home.
translations.de: Sie arbeitet derzeit von zu Hause aus.
translations.pt: Ela está atualmente trabalhando de casa.
translations.vi: Hiện tại cô ấy đang làm việc tại nhà.
translations.hi: वह फिलहाल घर से काम कर रही है.
translations.el: Αυτή τη στιγμή εργάζεται από το σπίτι.
translations.id: Saat ini dia bekerja dari rumah.
translations.ro: În prezent ea lucrează de acasă.
translations.ja: 彼女は現在、在宅勤務をしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person feminine singular.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase serving as a predicative complement.
Compound noun; head of the prepositional phrase 'en télétravail'.

sentences.target: Nous n'acceptons actuellement plus de commandes.

translations.fr: Nous n'acceptons actuellement plus de commandes.
translations.en: We are currently no longer accepting orders.
translations.de: Wir nehmen derzeit keine Bestellungen mehr an.
translations.ko: 현재 주문을 더 이상 받지 않습니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们目前不再接收订单。
translations.yue: 我哋而家唔再接受訂單。
translations.ru: Мы сейчас больше не принимаем заказы.
translations.pt: Atualmente não estamos mais aceitando pedidos.
translations.he: אנחנו כרגע כבר לא מקבלים הזמנות.
translations.vi: Hiện tại chúng tôi không nhận đơn hàng nữa.
translations.ar: نحن حالياً لم نعد نستقبل الطلبات.
translations.nl: We accepteren momenteel geen bestellingen meer.
translations.uk: Ми зараз більше не приймаємо замовлення.
translations.hi: हम फिलहाल अब ऑर्डर स्वीकार नहीं कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αυτή τη στιγμή δεν δεχόμαστε πλέον παραγγελίες.
translations.nb: Vi tar for øyeblikket ikke lenger imot bestillinger.
translations.id: Saat ini kami tidak lagi menerima pesanan.
translations.sv: Vi tar för närvarande inte längre emot beställningar.
translations.ro: În prezent nu mai acceptăm comenzi.
translations.da: Vi modtager i øjeblikket ikke længere ordrer.
translations.fi: Emme tällä hetkellä enää ota vastaan tilauksia.
translations.ja: 現在、注文は受け付けていません。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Finite verb (present indicative, 1st person plural) with attached negative clitic 'n’'; main predicate of the clause.
Adverb modifying the verb, indicating the current time frame.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne … plus' construction; means 'no longer/anymore' in this context.
Preposition used with the quantifier 'plus' to link to the noun phrase ('plus de commandes').
Common noun (plural); complement of 'plus de', functioning as the direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Le métro est actuellement en maintenance.

translations.fr: Le métro est actuellement en maintenance.
translations.en: The subway is currently under maintenance.
translations.es: El metro está actualmente en mantenimiento.
translations.it: La metropolitana è attualmente in manutenzione.
translations.pt: O metrô está atualmente em manutenção.
translations.vi: Tàu điện ngầm hiện đang được bảo trì.
translations.nl: De metro is momenteel in onderhoud.
translations.hu: A metró jelenleg karbantartás alatt van.
translations.pl: Metro jest obecnie w trakcie konserwacji.
translations.el: Το μετρό βρίσκεται αυτή τη στιγμή σε συντήρηση.
translations.nb: T-banen er for øyeblikket under vedlikehold.
translations.id: Kereta bawah tanah saat ini sedang dalam pemeliharaan.
translations.sv: Tunnelbanan är för närvarande under underhåll.
translations.ro: Metroul este în prezent în întreținere.
translations.da: Metroen er i øjeblikket onder vedligeholdelse.
translations.ja: 地下鉄は現在、メンテナンス中です.

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the subject noun.
Common noun; grammatical subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase serving as a predicative complement.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase 'en maintenance'.
